thirdPartyConfig.tip.bilibili: Configure Bilibili downloader settings including cookie authentication and download parameters.
thirdPartyConfig.tip.exhentai: Configure ExHentai downloader settings. Cookie is required for authentication.
thirdPartyConfig.tip.pixiv: Configure Pixiv downloader settings including authentication and download parameters.
thirdPartyConfig.tip.soulplus: Configure SoulPlus settings including cookie authentication and auto-buy threshold.
thirdPartyConfig.tip.bangumi: Configure Bangumi settings including request parameters and authentication.
thirdPartyConfig.tip.cien: Configure Cien downloader settings including authentication and download parameters.
thirdPartyConfig.tip.dlsite: Configure DLsite downloader settings including authentication and download parameters.
thirdPartyConfig.tip.fanbox: Configure Fanbox downloader settings including authentication and download parameters.
thirdPartyConfig.tip.fantia: Configure Fantia downloader settings including authentication and download parameters.
thirdPartyConfig.tip.patreon: Configure Patreon downloader settings including authentication and download parameters.
thirdPartyConfig.tip.tmdb: Configure TMDB (The Movie Database) settings including API key and request parameters.
thirdPartyConfig.steam.language.label: Language
thirdPartyConfig.steam.language.descript: Affects all data fetched from Steam, including sync and metadata (game name, description, tags, etc.). Leave empty to auto-detect from app language.
thirdPartyConfig.autoSync.intervalDescri: How often to automatically sync data from this source. Set to 0 or leave empty to disable.
thirdPartyConfig.autoSync.warning: Setting a very short interval may cause your account to be rate-limited or blocked by the service provider.
thirdPartyConfig.recommendedDir.title: Use recommended directory?
thirdPartyConfig.recommendedDir.descript: We recommend using a dedicated subdirectory to keep files organized.
thirdPartyConfig.field.defaultPath.label: Default Download Path
thirdPartyConfig.field.defaultPath.descr: Default path where downloaded files will be saved.
thirdPartyConfig.field.maxConcurrency.de: Maximum number of concurrent requests. Higher values may speed up data fetching but could trigger rate limiting.
thirdPartyConfig.field.requestInterval.d: Minimum time between requests in milliseconds. Helps avoid rate limiting.
thirdPartyConfig.field.maxRetries.descri: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed requests.
thirdPartyConfig.field.requestTimeout.de: Maximum time to wait for a response before timing out.
Define how downloaded files and folders should be named. Use available variables below.
